title: AL's Zombies Revamped x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Zombies Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Zombies Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6311b36cdb3f8abc424812418ec1cf6a1483067.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Zombies Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8WVZPN3CB70" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

Since AL's Zombies Revamped uses a custom model for it's Zombies, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This addon pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

 

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
